compiled_state.title: dso:completion-verifier sub-agent not available in plugin-loaded context
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When /dso:sprint dispatches dso:completion-verifier via the Agent tool with subagent_type='dso:completion-verifier', the agent type is not found. Error: 'Agent type dso:completion-verifier not found'. The sprint SKILL.md Step 10a and Phase 6 Step 0.75 require dispatching this named agent (CLAUDE.md rule 24). The agent definition exists at plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md but is not registered in the available agent types. Sprint falls back to general-purpose with the agent definition read inline, which satisfies the immediate need but bypasses the named-agent dispatch path. Fix: ensure dso:completion-verifier is registered and available via the Agent tool when the dso plugin is loaded.
